projectDescription: AICord is an AI-powered Discord bot that lets server admins create customizable AI characters for chat, roleplay, image generation, voice calls, and agentic automations.
keyFeatures: Create and manage AI characters with custom personalities and backstories
Bot mode: give each AI character its own Discord bot identity
Prompt commands for dynamic in-chat character control
Image generation with Flux, Stable Diffusion, and Animagine
Voice messages and voice cloning for characters
Voice calls with AI characters in Discord or on the dashboard
God mode prompt for full system-prompt customization
AICord Applets: JavaScript mini-apps that give characters agentic capabilities
Text generation, summarization, and document Q&A slash commands
Token-based usage system with free and premium tiers
publicApiSurface: Applet manifest (name, description, visibility, input, triggers)
God mode prompt template variables ({name}, {context}, {personality}, {appearance}, {memories}, etc.)
